Localization.Description: The MultiDump utility was used for dumping LSASS memory discreetly, without triggering Defender alerts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} locally saved the contents of the LSASS process memory to file "{object.name}" using utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} dumped the LSASS process memory using utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host} and then sent it to remote host {dst.ip}:{dst.port}
